title: Bisikan Tengah Hening Dapur
theme: Menjelajahi dinamika hubungan antara orang tua dan anak yang semakin menjauh, menemukan cara untuk merajut kembali kehangatan keluarga di tengah kesibukan hidup.

cover.prompt: A minimalist composition of a partially open wrought iron gate leading to a home's entrance on a tranquil residential street. The scene is set just before midnight, illuminated by a gentle, ambient glow from a distant streetlamp or a soft interior light filtering through. Focus on the quietude of the surroundings and the simple lines of the architecture. A subtle sense of arrival and contemplation.
cover.style: Minimalist composition, strong silhouettes, gentle lighting

meta.plan_summary: A busy son returns home late to find his elderly mother awake in the kitchen, preparing a snack. Their initial awkward silence, a symptom of growing distance due to his demanding schedule, eventually breaks into a tender and honest conversation. They confront their unspoken longings and rediscover comfort and understanding in their simple, late-night exchange, realizing the profound importance of their bond.
